titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the University Career Services, Yale University, Records
University Career Services, Yale University, Records
titlestmt.author: compiled by Daniel Hartwig

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

conventiondeclaration.abbr: Finding aid created in accordance with Manuscripts and Archives Processing Manual
conventiondeclaration.citation: translation missing: en.enumerations.resource_finding_aid_description_rules.Finding aid created in accordance with Manuscripts and Archives Processing Manual

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Wednesday May 19, 2021 at 07:03

did.unittitle: University Career Services, Yale University, records
did.abstract: The records consist of materials concerning the Master of Arts in Teaching (M.A.T.) degree, teacher placement, pre-medical students, fellowship applications, scholarships, reports on Yale Conferences on the Teaching of Social Studies and English, and the National Science Foundation Summer Institute. Also included are registration cards, minutes, correspondence, memoranda, reports, budgets, and administrative files of Undergraduate Career Services (formerly) Yale University Career Services.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 9-E (YRG 9-E), Records documenting Yale College offices, programs, and projects.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to the materials is restricted. See Collection Contents for details.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: University Career Services, Yale University, Records (RU 717). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Yale University records are arranged and described at the accession level by the creating office. The University Archives creates collection level descriptive records, but typically does no further arrangement and description at the accession level.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of materials concerning the Master of Arts in Teaching (M.A.T.) degree, teacher placement, pre-medical students, fellowship applications, scholarships, reports on Yale Conferences on the Teaching of Social Studies and English, and the National Science Foundation Summer Institute. Also included are registration cards, minutes, correspondence, memoranda, reports, budgets, and administrative files of Undergraduate Career Services (formerly) Yale University Career Services.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged by accession.

did.unittitle: Pre-medical and special category student records
CAREER ADVISORY AND PLACEMENT SERVICE (CAPS) PRE-MED FILES
Pre-medical and fellowship program student records
Pre-medical, fellowship program, and Junior Year Abroad student records
Extra Letters not to be used
Records relating to the Fulbright Scholarship Committee
Candidates for Study in Australia/New Zealand
Pre-medical, fellowship program, and Junior Year Abroad records
Data Entry for New Fellowships (Alphabetical by Granting Agency)
Fulbright candidates that withdrew from competition
Student records for the Class of 1987
Pre-medical student records for applicants to medical schools in 1988-1990

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.
